case_title: ALVIAR, RONABELLE et al VS HALL, BEALO

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF SEP-23-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALVIAR, RONABELLE MUNOZ, MARLON P. (MINOR) MUNOZ, ERLINDA P. (GUARDIAN) AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, BEALO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
